CurrentIssues.ID: ArgumentListWrapping:CorpusExtractionProbe.kt$CorpusExtractionProbe$("[corpus-probe] $name: ${index.sections.size} sections, ${index.pages.size} pages, " + "$tableRows tableRows, $imageMarkers images, $urlRefs urls, ${md.length} chars")

ArgumentListWrapping:CorpusExtractionProbe.kt$CorpusExtractionProbe$("| file | ext | bytes | pages | #sectionAnchors | #pageAnchors | tableRows | imageMarkers | embeddedObjs | urlRefs | chars | status |")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocumentArtifactStoreSearchTest.kt$DocumentArtifactStoreSearchTest$(m.snippet.contains("«") && m.snippet.contains("»"), "snippet must delimit the match; got: ${m.snippet}")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocumentArtifactStoreSubsectionDiscoveryTest.kt$DocumentArtifactStoreSubsectionDiscoveryTest$(total, slice.totalSectionCount, "the FULL section count must be reported so truncation is never silent")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocumentBlockHandlerHeadingDetectionTest.kt$DocumentBlockHandlerHeadingDetectionTest$( 1, blocks.filterIsInstance<DocumentBlock.Heading>().size, "real heading '$line' must stay a Heading; got: $blocks", )

ArgumentListWrapping:DocumentBlockHandlerHeadingDetectionTest.kt$DocumentBlockHandlerHeadingDetectionTest$( 1, blocks.filterIsInstance<DocumentBlock.Heading>().size, "real numbered heading '$line' must stay a Heading; got: $blocks", )
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$("Abacus with solid fill", ref.altText, "docPr descr must surface as the figure's alt-text")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$("BOLD ITALIC plain", text, "Bold/italic runs collapse to plain text — DocumentBlock has no inline-style field")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$("REMOVED", tracked.single().anchorText, "Deleted text should be in anchorText so the assembler can render it in the header")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(0, tracked.size, "Empty w:ins (no text inside) should not emit a Comment block")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(1, commentBlocks.size, "Expected the orphaned marker (id=99) to be skipped, only the real id=1 comment emitted")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(blocks.none { it is DocumentBlock.EmbeddedFileRef }, "No images in the doc → visitor emits nothing")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(blocks.none { it is DocumentBlock.EmbeddedFileRef }, "Without ImageExtractionService, ImageExtractionVisitor is not in the chain → no image emission")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(blocks.none { it is DocumentBlock.EmbeddedObjectRef }, "Plain picture should not yield any EmbeddedObjectRef placeholder")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(body.contains("Footnotes[^fn2] and endnotes[^en2] are recognized."), "Surrounding prose + inline refs should be intact; got: $body")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(commentIdx > listIdx, "Comment must emit AFTER the ListBlock, not between items. Got: $classes")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(imageRef, "Oversize image still emits an EmbeddedFileRef placeholder so the LLM knows an image exists")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(introIdx >= 0 && listIdx > introIdx, "Paragraph must appear before the ListBlock in extracted order")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(items.containsAll(listOf("Step 1", "Step 2", "Step 3")), "All SmartArt text items should appear in the ListBlock; got items: $items")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(java.nio.file.Files.exists(java.nio.file.Path.of(imageRef.path!!)), "Saved file should exist on disk at the reported path")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(listBlocks.isNotEmpty(), "Expected at least one ListBlock from SmartArt; got: ${blocks.map { it::class.simpleName }}")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(listOf("Parent", " Child", " Grandchild"), listBlock!!.items, "Level 0 → no indent, level 1 → ' ', level 2 → ' '")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(listOf("author-1", "author-2", "author-3"), commentBlocks.map { it.author }, "Comments should be emitted in ascending w:id order")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(listOf("item-one", "item-two", "item-three"), list.items, "All three items should be in the ListBlock, regardless of comment anchoring")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(paragraphs.none { it.text in listOf("Apple", "Banana", "Cherry") }, "List-item text must NOT also appear as Paragraph blocks (double-emission)")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(refs[0].path, refs[1].path, "Content-addressed: identical bytes within one doc share the same on-disk path")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(savedFiles.isEmpty(), "No file should have been written for the oversize image; got: $savedFiles")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(text!!.contains(needle), "DocxTableExtractor must NOT touch '$needle' directly; delegate to FootnoteExtractionVisitor")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(text.contains("**") || text.contains("<b>") || text.contains("*ITALIC*"), "Extractor must not invent Markdown/HTML formatting; it has none to invent from")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(text.contains("E = mc^2"), "Math-only paragraph should still emit a Paragraph; got: $text")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(text.contains("The equation is"), "Surrounding prose should be preserved; got: $text")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(text.contains("a^2 + b^2 = c^2"), "oMathPara plain-text should surface; got: $text")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(text.contains("the spec (https://workflow.example.com/spec)"), "Hyperlink should appear as 'visible text (url)'; got: $text")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(text.contains("x + 2 = y"), "OMath plain-text fallback should appear in the paragraph; got: $text")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(tracked.single().text.isBlank(), "TRACKED_DELETION body should be blank — the deleted text is in the header")

ArgumentListWrapping:DocxTableExtractorTest.kt$DocxTableExtractorTest$(paragraphBetween, "Expected at least one Paragraph block between the two tables; " + "blocks between tables: ${blocksBetween.map { it::class.simpleName }}")
ArgumentListWrapping:DocxVisitorChainTest.kt$DocxVisitorChainTest$(blocks.first() is DocumentBlock.Heading, "First block should be a Heading; got ${blocks.first()::class.simpleName}")

ArgumentListWrapping:EmbeddedFileRefUnreachableTest.kt$EmbeddedFileRefUnreachableTest$(PDFParserConfig.OCR_STRATEGY.NO_OCR, cfg.ocrStrategy, "OCR is explicitly OFF — flipping this without adding an OCR parser will break TikaDocumentExtractor's " + "init-block 'no OCR parser registered' assertion.")

ArgumentListWrapping:EmbeddedFileRefUnreachableTest.kt$EmbeddedFileRefUnreachableTest$(cfg.isExtractAnnotationText, "Annotation extraction is OFF — PdfMetadataExtractor is the SOLE annotation source post-Phase-4b. " + "Re-enabling this would re-introduce duplicate annotation Paragraphs alongside the typed Comment blocks.")

ArgumentListWrapping:EmbeddedFileRefUnreachableTest.kt$EmbeddedFileRefUnreachableTest$(cfg.isExtractInlineImages, "Images are explicitly OFF — if this flips, PDF images will start flowing through " + "Tika as separate parser invocations and the extractor still has nowhere to put them.")

ArgumentListWrapping:EmbeddedFileRefUnreachableTest.kt$EmbeddedFileRefUnreachableTest$(expected, producers, "EmbeddedFileRef producer set changed — update this list to reflect the new positive behaviour. " + "Current producers: $producers")
ArgumentListWrapping:ImageExtractionVisitor.kt$ImageExtractionVisitor$(name = name, mimeType = mime, path = null, altText = altText)
ArgumentListWrapping:ImageExtractionVisitor.kt$ImageExtractionVisitor$(name = name, mimeType = saveResult.mimeType, path = saveResult.path.toString(), altText = altText)
ArgumentListWrapping:ImageMimeSniffAndFilterTest.kt$ImageMimeSniffAndFilterTest$("application/octet-stream", result.mimeType, "Fallback to declared MIME when sniffing inconclusive")
ArgumentListWrapping:ImageMimeSniffAndFilterTest.kt$ImageMimeSniffAndFilterTest$("image/png", result.mimeType, "Expected sniffed MIME image/png but got: ${result.mimeType}")
ArgumentListWrapping:ImageMimeSniffAndFilterTest.kt$ImageMimeSniffAndFilterTest$(result.path.toString().endsWith(".png"), "Expected .png extension from sniffed MIME but got: ${result.path}")
ArgumentListWrapping:IndexedExtractionProbe.kt$IndexedExtractionProbe$("| PDF | bytes | pages | #sectionAnchors | #pageAnchors | exact-hit | slug-hit | natural-hit |")

ArgumentListWrapping:MarkdownAssembler.kt$MarkdownAssembler$("

*[Document truncated at $n characters of $m total characters; $x of $y blocks rendered$footnoteClause]*
")
ArgumentListWrapping:MarkdownAssemblerTableAnchorTest.kt$MarkdownAssemblerTableAnchorTest$("Table 8.7.3-2 specifies the default and optional Transfer Syntax UID combinations.")
ArgumentListWrapping:MarkdownAssemblerTableAnchorTest.kt$MarkdownAssemblerTableAnchorTest$(out.index.sections.none { it.key.contains("Fare Parameters") }, "table caption must not be in sections")
ArgumentListWrapping:MarkdownAssemblerTableAnchorTest.kt$MarkdownAssemblerTableAnchorTest$(out.index.tables.isEmpty(), "prose references must not be indexed as captions; got ${out.index.tables}")
ArgumentListWrapping:OfficePipelineTest.kt$OfficePipelineTest$(blocks.any { it is DocumentBlock.Heading }, "Expected at least one Heading block")
ArgumentListWrapping:OfficePipelineTest.kt$OfficePipelineTest$(blocks.any { it is DocumentBlock.Table }, "Expected at least one Table block")
ArgumentListWrapping:PdfOutlineDeepSubsectionTest.kt$PdfOutlineDeepSubsectionTest$( 1, deep.size, "outline already covers '2.4.4.1' → exactly ONE anchor, no heuristic duplicate; got: $headings", )
ArgumentListWrapping:PdfOutlineDeepSubsectionTest.kt$PdfOutlineDeepSubsectionTest$( 1, deepAnchors.size, "exactly one '2.4.4.1' section anchor; got: ${index.sections.map { it.key }}", )

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfPageAttributionTest.kt$PdfPageAttributionTest$(anchorK != null && at >= anchorK && at < anchorNext, "page-$k text found at $at but its anchor is $anchorK (next ${pageAnchors[k + 1]}). " + "Text is not under its own page marker.")

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfPageAttributionTest.kt$PdfPageAttributionTest$(span1to2 < md.length / 2, "page-1 anchor span ($span1to2) holds >=50% of the ${md.length}-char body — prose collapsed under page 1. anchors=$pageAnchors")

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfPageAttributionTest.kt$PdfPageAttributionTest$(tinyGaps <= 1, "most page anchors are <20 chars apart ($tinyGaps tiny gaps of ${gaps.size}) — pages are empty markers. gaps=$gaps")
ArgumentListWrapping:PdfPipelineTest.kt$PdfPipelineTest$(ref, "Expected an EmbeddedFileRef for the image XObject; blocks=${blocks.map { it::class.simpleName }}")
ArgumentListWrapping:PdfPipelineTest.kt$PdfPipelineTest$(ref.path, "Path must be non-null when service is wired and attachment fits within maxBytesPerImage")

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfPreformattedCorpusByteIdenticalTest.kt$PdfPreformattedCorpusByteIdenticalTest$(codeBlocks.any { cb -> cb.lines.any { it.contains("HTTP-version") && it.contains("HTTP-name") } }, "HTTP-version ABNF production not fenced")

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfPreformattedCorpusByteIdenticalTest.kt$PdfPreformattedCorpusByteIdenticalTest$(codeBlocks.any { cb -> cb.lines.size >= 2 && cb.lines.any { it.contains("chunked-body") } }, "chunked-body multi-line ABNF not fenced with line structure")
ArgumentListWrapping:PdfPreformattedCorpusByteIdenticalTest.kt$PdfPreformattedCorpusByteIdenticalTest$(codeBlocks.size >= 5, "expected several fenced CodeBlocks in rfc7230, found ${codeBlocks.size}")
ArgumentListWrapping:PdfPreformattedSubstitutionTest.kt$PdfPreformattedSubstitutionTest$(code.none { it.lines.any { l -> l.contains("PROSEALPHA") } }, "prose was wrongly fenced as code")

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfPreformattedSubstitutionTest.kt$PdfPreformattedSubstitutionTest$(dump(withoutSf2), dump(withSf2), "SF-2 preformatted handling must not alter ordinary single-column prose output")
ArgumentListWrapping:PdfPreformattedSubstitutionTest.kt$PdfPreformattedSubstitutionTest$(fenced.lineSequence().count { it.isNotBlank() } >= 2, "fenced block collapsed to one line:\n$md")

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfPreformattedSubstitutionTest.kt$PdfPreformattedSubstitutionTest$(httpLine >= 0 && chunkLine >= 0 && httpLine != chunkLine, "ABNF productions collapsed onto one line: $codeLines")

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfRealExtractionGroundTruthTest.kt$PdfRealExtractionGroundTruthTest$(headings.contains("1.0 Framework Introduction"), "TOC's multi-space title normalized to single space; got: $headings")

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfRealExtractionGroundTruthTest.kt$PdfRealExtractionGroundTruthTest$(offset, "section '$label' must resolve via the index (substring match); sections=${e.index.sections.map { it.key }}")

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfTableExtractorContinuationMergeTest.kt$PdfTableExtractorContinuationMergeTest$( cs, font, xs = floatArrayOf(72f, 180f, 290f, 400f, 540f), // 4 columns ys = floatArrayOf(ph - 50f, ph - 72f, ph - 94f), rows = listOf( listOf("A", "B", "C", "D"), listOf("1", "2", "3", "4"), listOf("5", "6", "7", "8"), ), )

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfTableExtractorContinuationMergeTest.kt$PdfTableExtractorContinuationMergeTest$( cs, font, xs = floatArrayOf(72f, 220f, 360f, 540f), ys = floatArrayOf(180f, 158f, 136f, 114f), // header + 2 data rows rows = listOf( listOf("Sym", "Type", "Desc"), listOf("clk", "in", "clock"), listOf("en", "in", "enable"), ), )

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfTableExtractorContinuationMergeTest.kt$PdfTableExtractorContinuationMergeTest$( cs, font, xs = floatArrayOf(72f, 220f, 360f, 540f), ys = floatArrayOf(180f, 158f, 136f, 114f), rows = listOf( listOf("Sym", "Type", "Desc"), listOf("clk", "in", "clock"), listOf("en", "in", "enable"), ), )

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfTableExtractorContinuationMergeTest.kt$PdfTableExtractorContinuationMergeTest$( cs, font, xs = floatArrayOf(72f, 220f, 360f, 540f), ys = floatArrayOf(ph - 50f, ph - 72f, ph - 94f), // 2 data rows, no header rows = listOf( listOf("", "", "reset"), // blank-dominant continuation first row listOf("out", "out", "result"), ), )

ArgumentListWrapping:PdfTableExtractorContinuationMergeTest.kt$PdfTableExtractorContinuationMergeTest$( cs, font, xs = floatArrayOf(72f, 220f, 360f, 540f), ys = floatArrayOf(ph - 50f, ph - 72f, ph - 94f), rows = listOf( listOf("Code", "Status", "Note"), // fully-populated DIFFERENT header listOf("E1", "open", "first"), listOf("E2", "closed", "second"), ), )
ArgumentListWrapping:PdfTwoColumnSubstitutionTest.kt$PdfTwoColumnSubstitutionTest$(textOf(withoutSf1), textOf(withSf1), "SF-1 column handling must not alter single-column output")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractor.kt$PptxExtractor$(name = name, mimeType = saveResult.mimeType, path = saveResult.path.toString(), altText = altText)
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$("PowerPoint.Slide.8", obj!!.name, "OLE placeholder should carry the progId as its identifier")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(1, countOccurrences(firstCell, "Web Page"), "Cell display text must appear once, was: $firstCell")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(1, s1Range.count { it is DocumentBlock.EmbeddedFileRef }, "Slide 1 should own exactly one EmbeddedFileRef")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(1, s2Range.count { it is DocumentBlock.EmbeddedFileRef }, "Slide 2 should own exactly one EmbeddedFileRef")

ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(blocks.none { it is DocumentBlock.EmbeddedFileRef }, "Without ImageExtractionService wired, picture shapes are skipped (legacy behaviour)")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(blocks.none { it is DocumentBlock.ListBlock }, "No SmartArt → no ListBlocks")

ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(firstCell.contains("[Web Page](http://poi.apache.org/)"), "Hyperlink in a table cell should render as a markdown link, was: $firstCell")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(items.containsAll(listOf("Idea", "Plan", "Execute")), "All SmartArt text items should appear; got items: $items")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(java.nio.file.Files.exists(java.nio.file.Path.of(ref.path!!)), "Saved file should exist at the reported path")

ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(listBlocks.isNotEmpty(), "Expected at least one ListBlock from PPTX SmartArt; got: ${blocks.map { it::class.simpleName }}")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(text.contains(" | ") && text.contains(" end"), "Plain runs must remain in the text, was: $text")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(text.contains("<b>") || text.contains("**BOLD**"), "Extractor never invents Markdown/HTML markup for bold/italic")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(text.contains("BOLD ITALIC plain"), "All run text is concatenated — but style metadata is gone, was: $text")

ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(text.contains("[Email](mailto:dev@poi.apache.org)"), "Email hyperlink should render as a mailto markdown link, was: $text")

ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(text.contains("[Web Page](http://poi.apache.org/)"), "External hyperlink should render as a markdown link, was: $text")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(texts.any { it.contains("text-at-depth-2") }, "Recursion must handle arbitrary nesting depth; got texts: $texts")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(texts.any { it.contains("text-inside-a-group") }, "Group-shape children must be recursed into; got texts: $texts")

ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$PptxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(topIdx >= 0 && groupIdx > topIdx && trailingIdx > groupIdx, "Order should be: top → group child → trailing; got texts: $texts")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorTest.kt$PptxExtractorTest$(3, table.rows.size, "Slide 2 table should have 3 data rows")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorTest.kt$PptxExtractorTest$(listOf("RiskId", "Likelihood", "Impact"), table!!.headers, "Slide 2 table headers should be [RiskId, Likelihood, Impact]")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorTest.kt$PptxExtractorTest$(notesBlock!!.text.contains("Demo notes", ignoreCase = true), "Notes paragraph should contain 'Demo notes', was: '${notesBlock.text}'")

ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorTest.kt$PptxExtractorTest$(notesBlock, "Expected a notes paragraph starting with '> Notes:' in Slide 1 blocks; " + "paragraphs found: ${slide1Blocks.filterIsInstance<DocumentBlock.Paragraph>().map { it.text }}")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorTest.kt$PptxExtractorTest$(slideHeadings[0].startsWith("Slide 1"), "First slide heading should start with 'Slide 1', was: ${slideHeadings[0]}")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorTest.kt$PptxExtractorTest$(slideHeadings[1].startsWith("Slide 2"), "Second slide heading should start with 'Slide 2', was: ${slideHeadings[1]}")
ArgumentListWrapping:PptxExtractorTest.kt$PptxExtractorTest$(slideHeadings[2].startsWith("Slide 3"), "Third slide heading should start with 'Slide 3', was: ${slideHeadings[2]}")

ArgumentListWrapping:TableAnchorCorpusProbe.kt$TableAnchorCorpusProbe$(byNumber.content.contains("Request Header Fields", ignoreCase = true) || byNumber.content.contains("Table 5.2-1", ignoreCase = true), "the resolved region should be the Request Header Fields table; got head: ${byNumber.content.take(120)}")

ArgumentListWrapping:TableAnchorCorpusProbe.kt$TableAnchorCorpusProbe$(byNumber.sectionMatched == true && byNumber.startOffset > 0, "section='Table 5.2-1' must resolve to the table (offset=${byNumber.startOffset}, matched=${byNumber.sectionMatched})")

ArgumentListWrapping:TableAnchorCorpusProbe.kt$TableAnchorCorpusProbe$(index.tables.any { it.key.contains("TABLE 1-2", ignoreCase = true) }, "TABLE 1-2 must be indexed; tables=${index.tables.map { it.key }.take(10)}")

ArgumentListWrapping:TableAnchorCorpusProbe.kt$TableAnchorCorpusProbe$(index.tables.any { it.key.contains("Table 5.2-1", ignoreCase = true) }, "Table 5.2-1 must be indexed; tables=${index.tables.map { it.key }.take(10)}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TableAnchorCorpusProbe.kt$TableAnchorCorpusProbe$(slice.availableTables.isNotEmpty(), "availableTables must be surfaced separately from availableSections")

ArgumentListWrapping:TableAnchorCorpusProbe.kt$TableAnchorCorpusProbe$(slice.content.contains("PINOUT", ignoreCase = true) || slice.content.contains("Table 1-2", ignoreCase = true), "the resolved region should be the pinout table; got head: ${slice.content.take(120)}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TableAnchorCorpusProbe.kt$TableAnchorCorpusProbe$(slice.startOffset > 0, "must resolve to a real offset, not a fallback to 0 (got ${slice.startOffset})")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaDocumentExtractorTest.kt$TikaDocumentExtractorTest$("text/plain", content.mime, "Plain-text file with .pdf extension should be detected as text/plain")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaDocumentExtractorTest.kt$TikaDocumentExtractorTest$(1, markdowns.size, "All 4 concurrent extractions must produce identical markdown; got ${markdowns.size} distinct outputs")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaDocumentExtractorTest.kt$TikaDocumentExtractorTest$(content.markdown.contains("Alice"), "Full content must be present when options.maxChars=1000")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaDocumentExtractorTest.kt$TikaDocumentExtractorTest$(content.markdown.contains("Q1"), "Markdown must contain merged cell value 'Q1'; snippet: ${content.markdown.take(1000)}")

ArgumentListWrapping:TikaDocumentExtractorTest.kt$TikaDocumentExtractorTest$(content.markdown.length <= 50 + 300, // The first block may exceed 50 chars (single-block oversizing rule in assembler), // but the rest of the document must be cut off. We allow assembler overhead for the // truncation marker text itself (~300 chars). "Markdown length should be close to 50 chars budget; got ${content.markdown.length}", )
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaDocumentExtractorTest.kt$TikaDocumentExtractorTest$(content.truncated, "Markdown must NOT be truncated when options.maxChars=1000 on a tiny CSV")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaDocumentExtractorTest.kt$TikaDocumentExtractorTest$(md.contains("FR-001"), "Markdown must contain 'FR-001' from the FR table; snippet: ${md.take(1000)}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaDocumentExtractorTest.kt$TikaDocumentExtractorTest$(md.contains("Test") || md.contains("Actual"), "Markdown must contain Acceptance table content; snippet: ${md.take(1500)}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaDocumentExtractorTest.kt$TikaDocumentExtractorTest$(result.isError, "Corrupt PDF must return isError=true; got summary: ${result.summary}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaDocumentExtractorTest.kt$TikaDocumentExtractorTest$(result.isError, "Encrypted PDF must return isError=true; got summary: ${result.summary}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaDocumentExtractorTest.kt$TikaDocumentExtractorTest$(result.isError, "Zero-byte file must return isError=true; got summary: ${result.summary}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlFormatGapsTest.kt$TikaXhtmlFormatGapsTest$("application/octet-stream", ref.mimeType, "MIME falls back to octet-stream when Tika strips the data: URI from src")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlFormatGapsTest.kt$TikaXhtmlFormatGapsTest$(1, tables.size, "Exactly one Table is emitted from nested HTML tables — inner structure is lost")

ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlFormatGapsTest.kt$TikaXhtmlFormatGapsTest$(firstImgIdx < middleTextIdx && middleTextIdx < secondImgIdx, "Images and text should interleave in document order; got img@$firstImgIdx middle@$middleTextIdx img2@$secondImgIdx")

ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlFormatGapsTest.kt$TikaXhtmlFormatGapsTest$(firstList >= 0 && between > firstList && secondList > between, "Expected ListBlock, Paragraph(between), ListBlock order; got: ${blocks.map { it::class.simpleName }}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlFormatGapsTest.kt$TikaXhtmlFormatGapsTest$(text.contains("<b>") || text.contains("**important**"), "Bold structure is gone — handler does not synthesise Markdown")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlFormatGapsTest.kt$TikaXhtmlFormatGapsTest$(text.contains("the details (https://example.com/details)"), "Anchor href should be appended as parenthetical; got: $text")

ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest.kt$TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest$(0, imageRefs.size, "Sub-threshold decorative icons (empty alt, ${'$'}width/height < 32) should be dropped; got ${imageRefs.size}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest.kt$TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest$(1, imageRefs.size, "A tiny image that carries a real alt is NOT purely decorative — keep it; got ${imageRefs.size}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest.kt$TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest$(2, imageRefs.size, "Real images (descriptive alt, or large dimensions) must survive; got ${imageRefs.size}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest.kt$TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest$(body.contains("#cite_note"), "Dead fragment ref token must be cleaned, not left as a broken link; body=$body")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest.kt$TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest$(body.contains("(#"), "No bare '(#...)' fragment parenthetical should survive; body=$body")

ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest.kt$TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest$(body.contains("the details (https://example.com/details)"), "A real external href must still be preserved as a parenthetical; body=$body")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest.kt$TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest$(body.contains(chrome), "Chrome text '$chrome' must be stripped, not promoted to a heading/body; body=$body")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest.kt$TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest$(heads.contains("Real Article Section"), "The real <h2> must survive as a heading; got headings=$heads")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest.kt$TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest$(imageRefs.any { it.altText == "System architecture diagram" }, "The alt-bearing diagram must survive")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest.kt$TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest$(imageRefs.size < 20, "A wall of 20 tiny decorative icons must NOT emit 20 image markers; got ${imageRefs.size}")

ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest.kt$TikaXhtmlHtmlFidelityTest$(listOf("Document Title", "Introduction", "Methods"), heads, "An ordinary article's headings must be untouched by the chrome strip")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlPipelineTest.kt$TikaXhtmlPipelineTest$(0, tables.size, "Multiline prose with commas must NOT become a Table when csvDetectionEnabled=false")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlPipelineTest.kt$TikaXhtmlPipelineTest$(1, paragraphs.size, "Multiline prose must produce exactly one Paragraph block")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlPipelineTest.kt$TikaXhtmlPipelineTest$(allText.contains("Release Notes"), "RTF output must contain 'Release Notes'; got: $allText")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlPipelineTest.kt$TikaXhtmlPipelineTest$(conclusionPara.text.contains("Performance was within target"), "conclusion paragraph must contain expected text")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlPipelineTest.kt$TikaXhtmlPipelineTest$(intro.text.contains("quarterly engineering report"), "intro paragraph should contain expected text")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlPipelineTest.kt$TikaXhtmlPipelineTest$(listOf("Name", "Score", "Grade"), table.headers, "CSV headers must be [Name, Score, Grade]")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlPipelineTest.kt$TikaXhtmlPipelineTest$(ocrParsers.isEmpty(), "No OCR parser should be registered; found: ${ocrParsers.map { it.value.javaClass.name }}")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlPipelineTest.kt$TikaXhtmlPipelineTest$(paragraphs.isNotEmpty(), "PDF extraction must produce at least one Paragraph block (prose-only Phase 3 test)")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlPipelineTest.kt$TikaXhtmlPipelineTest$(parsers.isNotEmpty(), "AutoDetectParser.parsers must be non-empty — TIKA-1145 ServiceLoader issue detected if empty")
ArgumentListWrapping:TikaXhtmlPipelineTest.kt$TikaXhtmlPipelineTest$(value in allCells, "Expected cell value '$value' not found in extracted cells: $allCells")

ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxDataFidelityTest.kt$XlsxDataFidelityTest$( "", table.rows[rowIdx][colIdx], "Spanned cell (row=$rowIdx,col=$colIdx) must be blank, not the fabricated anchor value. " + "Full table: ${table.rows}" )
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxDataFidelityTest.kt$XlsxDataFidelityTest$( 0 to 1, 0 to 2, // B2, C2 1 to 0, 1 to 1, 1 to 2, // A3, B3, C3 2 to 0, 2 to 1, 2 to 2, // A4, B4, C4 )

ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$("A2", comment.anchorText, "Anchor should be the cell reference (column letter + 1-indexed row) so the LLM can map back to the cell")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$("CRITICAL", v, "Rich-text runs collapse to plain text — DocumentBlock.Table cells are flat strings")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$("D2", comment.anchorText, "Anchor should be the out-of-band cell's A1 ref (D2), not coerced to a header column")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(1, tables.size, "No chart in workbook — should have exactly one Table (the sheet data). Got: ${tables.size}")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(2, chartTable.rows.size, "Chart table should have one row per category point (2)")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(blocks.none { it is DocumentBlock.EmbeddedFileRef }, "Without ImageExtractionService, image emission is skipped")

ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(chartTable!!.caption!!.contains("bar", ignoreCase = true), "P-7: chart caption should name the type (bar); caption='${chartTable.caption}'")

ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(chartTable, "Expected a Table whose caption starts with 'Monthly Metrics'; found captions: ${tables.map { it.caption }}")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(expectedShape, classes, "Multi-sheet workbook: each sheet's comments must belong to its OWN Table. Got: $classes")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(java.nio.file.Files.exists(java.nio.file.Path.of(ref.path!!)), "Saved file should exist on disk at the reported path")

ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(kvgIdx >= 0 && firstHeadingIdx > kvgIdx, "Defined names should come before any sheet Heading; got kvg@$kvgIdx headings@$firstHeadingIdx")

ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(listOf("A2", "B2", "A3"), comments.map { it.anchorText }, "Comments should be emitted in row-major order: row 1 left-to-right (A2 then B2), then row 2 (A3)")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(listOf("Category", "Sales", "Returns"), chartTable.headers, "Chart table headers must be Category + series titles")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(tables.any { it.caption != null }, "Sheet data Table should have null caption; only chart Tables carry a caption")

ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$XlsxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(tables.size >= 2, "Expected at least 2 Table blocks (sheet data + chart); got ${tables.size}. " + "All blocks: ${blocks.map { it::class.simpleName }}")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxSemanticsTest.kt$XlsxSemanticsTest$( listOf("Col A", "Col B"), table.headers, "Headerless sheet must use positional column headers, not promote data values", )
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxSemanticsTest.kt$XlsxSemanticsTest$( listOf("Column1", "Column2"), tableBlock!!.headers, "Defined-table block must expose the declared column headers", )
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxSemanticsTest.kt$XlsxSemanticsTest$(caption.contains("bar", ignoreCase = true), "Chart caption must name the type (bar); caption='$caption'")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxTableExtractorTest.kt$XlsxTableExtractorTest$("", notesTable.rows[2][0], "A3 (spanned) must be blank — the anchor value must not be duplicated")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxTableExtractorTest.kt$XlsxTableExtractorTest$("=COUNTIF(Bugs!B:B,\"CRITICAL\") (1)", criticalRow!![1], "COUNTIF formula text + evaluated value (1) should both be shown")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxTableExtractorTest.kt$XlsxTableExtractorTest$(listOf("Bugs", "Counts", "Notes"), headings, "Expected sheet headings in workbook order")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxTableExtractorTest.kt$XlsxTableExtractorTest$(listOf("Col A", "Col B"), notesTable.headers, "All-text Notes sheet has no header evidence ⇒ positional headers (P-5)")
ArgumentListWrapping:XlsxTableExtractorTest.kt$XlsxTableExtractorTest$(listOf("Section", "Note"), notesTable.rows[0], "The former 'header' row is now the first data row")

ComplexCondition:ImageExtractionService.kt$ImageExtractionService.Companion$b.size >= 12 && b[0] == 0x52.toByte() && b[1] == 0x49.toByte() && b[2] == 0x46.toByte() && b[3] == 0x46.toByte() && // "RIFF" b[8] == 0x57.toByte() && b[9] == 0x45.toByte() && b[10] == 0x42.toByte() && b[11] == 0x50.toByte()

ComplexCondition:ImageExtractionService.kt$ImageExtractionService.Companion$b.size >= 8 && b[0] == 0x89.toByte() && b[1] == 0x50.toByte() && b[2] == 0x4E.toByte() && b[3] == 0x47.toByte() && b[4] == 0x0D.toByte() && b[5] == 0x0A.toByte() && b[6] == 0x1A.toByte() && b[7] == 0x0A.toByte()
FunctionOnlyReturningConstant:XlsxTableExtractor.kt$XlsxTableExtractor$private fun allDataRowsBold(firstRow: Row, @Suppress("UNUSED_PARAMETER") dataRowCount: Int): Boolean

ImportOrdering:DocxTableExtractor.kt$import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.model.DocumentBlock import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.safeExtract import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.poi.visitor.CommentExtractionVisitor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.poi.visitor.DefaultHeadingParagraphVisitor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.poi.visitor.DefaultTableVisitor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.poi.visitor.FootnoteExtractionVisitor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.poi.visitor.ImageExtractionVisitor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.poi.visitor.ListAccumulatorVisitor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.poi.visitor.ParagraphVisitor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.poi.visitor.PostBodyVisitor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.poi.visitor.TableVisitor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.poi.visitor.TrackedChangeVisitor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.service.ImageExtractionService import org.apache.poi.xwpf.model.XWPFHeaderFooterPolicy import org.apache.poi.xwpf.usermodel.IBodyElement import org.apache.poi.xwpf.usermodel.XWPFDocument import org.apache.poi.xwpf.usermodel.XWPFParagraph import org.apache.poi.xwpf.usermodel.XWPFTable import java.io.InputStream

ImportOrdering:PdfPipeline.kt$import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.model.DocumentBlock import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.safeExtract import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.pdf.PdfColumnDetector import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.pdf.PdfColumnProseExtractor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.pdf.PdfLink import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.pdf.PdfMetadataExtractor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.pdf.PdfPreformattedDetector import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.pdf.PdfProseExtractor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.pdf.PdfTableExtractor import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.pdf.PositionedBlock import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.sax.DocumentBlockHandler import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.service.ImageExtractionService import org.apache.pdfbox.Loader import java.nio.file.Path

ImportOrdering:PptxExtractor.kt$import com.workflow.orchestrator.core.model.DocumentBlock import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.safeExtract import com.workflow.orchestrator.document.service.ImageExtractionService import org.apache.poi.common.usermodel.HyperlinkType import org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFComment import org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFGraphicFrame import org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFGroupShape import org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFObjectShape import org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFPictureData import org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFPictureShape import org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFShape import org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFSlide import org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFTable import org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFTextRun import org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFTextShape import org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XMLSlideShow import java.io.InputStream
ParameterListWrapping:PdfPipeline.kt$PdfPipeline$( aTop: Double, aBottom: Double, bTop: Double, bBottom: Double, )

Wrapping:DocumentArtifactStore.kt$DocumentArtifactStore${ done, total -> sink( DocumentExtractionProgress( stage = "tables", pagesDone = done, pagesTotal = total, elapsedMs = System.currentTimeMillis() - startMs, ) ) }

Wrapping:DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest.kt$DocxExtractorFormatGapsTest$(blocks.none { it is DocumentBlock.Paragraph && (it.text.startsWith("> Header:") || it.text.startsWith("> Footer:")) }, "No header/footer policy → no header/footer Paragraph")
Wrapping:TikaXhtmlPipelineTest.kt$TikaXhtmlPipelineTest$it is DocumentBlock.Paragraph && (it as DocumentBlock.Paragraph).text.contains("Performance was within target")
